qa_pairs.question: What action should a user take if an SSH host key fingerprint does not match the published list when connecting to an Alliance cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: If the host key fingerprint does not appear on the published list, a user should terminate the connection immediately and contact technical support for assistance.

qa_pairs.question: When were security upgrades implemented on the Alliance clusters, and where can users find details about any required actions?
qa_pairs.answer: Security upgrades were implemented on the Niagara cluster on May 31, 2019, and on all other clusters in September/October 2019. Users can find information on the one-time actions required after the Niagara upgrade on the specified documentation page, and more details on the general upgrades are available under 'SSH security improvements'.
